raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against American Express regarding a denied credit card dispute. 

On XX/XX/scrub>, 2026, I made a purchase at XXXX totaling {$130.00}. Of that total, {$100.00} was for a gift card. I am disputing only the {$100.00} gift card portion of the transaction. 

After the purchase, the gift card had no usable balance/value. I did not receive the functioning stored-value product that I paid for. 

I disputed the {$100.00} gift card portion of the charge with American Express. American Express closed the dispute and stated : Because this dispute pertains to Gift card, we weren't able to investigate it. We suggest you to please contact the place of purchase for assistance. 

That response did not address the actual problem. My dispute is not based on buyers remorse or a general refund request. My dispute is that I paid {$100.00} for stored value and received a gift card with no usable value. 

I contacted the merchant, XXXX, and XXXX refused to refund or correct the issue. American Express then refused to investigate solely because the transaction involved a gift card. 

I am requesting that American Express re-open and investigate the {$100.00} disputed portion of this transaction and credit back that amount, along with any related interest or fees associated with that disputed amount.
